name: Rum Negroni
description: A rum-based Negroni made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho, MARTINI Riserva Speciale Rubino, and MARTINI Riserva Speciale Bitter. What do you call a negroni made with BACARDÍ Ocho? A Rum Negroni! Pour one during special occasions. It's like a Negroni, but with the richness of BACARDÍ Ocho. A classic reinvented.
recipe_steps: Combine all of the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass filled with a large ice cube.
Garnish with an orange wedge or twist.
searchable_text: Rum Negroni main rum BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum A rum-based Negroni made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho, MARTINI Riserva Speciale Rubino, and MARTINI Riserva Speciale Bitter. What do you call a negroni made with BACARDÍ Ocho? A Rum Negroni! Pour one during special occasions. It's like a Negroni, but with the richness of BACARDÍ Ocho. A classic reinvented. ingredients 30 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum, 30 ml MARTINI Riserva Speciale Rubino, 30 ml MARTINI Riserva Speciale Bitter recipe steps Combine all of the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice. Stir until well chilled. Strain into a rocks glass filled with a large ice cube. Garnish with an orange wedge or twist.
